finding_results.notes: Recast Maya's recorder and letter guidance into concrete sensory/family detail and replaced explicit exculpation with unresolved, character-true ambiguity that keeps pressure on Ravi and Anika in the present scene.

Broke the bathroom letter block into short excerpts interleaved with immediate physical reactions (movement, lock check, breath count, eavesdropping), with each reaction changing how Anika proceeds to the next excerpt.

Expanded the dinner aftermath from summary into live micro-conflict with line-level interruption and embodied table consequences (wrist grab, letter relocation, spilled water, forced reset of eating behavior).

summary: All three packet findings were resolved with focused structural/craft edits in chapter 11: Maya's posthumous guidance now heightens ambiguity instead of adjudicating guilt, the bathroom letter sequence now preserves causal momentum through interleaved action, and the dinner aftermath now pays immediate emotional cost on-page.
